data.title: Ark Invest Sells Bitcoin ETF Shares Worth $12.4 Million
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ark Invest disclosed that it sold 159,496 shares of the ARK 21Shares Bitcoin ETF (ARKB) from its ARKW fund on April 7. The transaction is valued at approximately $12.4 million.

data.title: Brazilian Central Bank Official: Central Bank Regulation on Virtual Assets is Expected to Be Introduced Soon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that officials from the Brazilian Central Bank said that central bank regulation on virtual assets is expected to be introduced soon. (Jinshi)

data.title: Data: TUT leads the Meme coin list in March, with an increase of 2289%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to HC Capital’s post on the X platform, the top 10 Meme coins with the highest growth in March are:

COCO (+354%)
BANANAS31 (+211%)
LUCE (+143%)
FOUR (+105%)
FARTCOIN (+73.8%)
CHEEMS (+56%)
DOGINME (+51.1%)

Meme coins are still widely active in BNB Chain, Solana, Base, SUI and other ecosystems.

data.title: Ethereum Whale Holds $12.3M in Unrealized Gains Despite 2025 Downtrend
data.description:
TL;DR An Ethereum whale reactivated their wallet after seven years and transferred 2,000 ETH to Kraken, raising concerns about potential mass sell-offs in an already weakened market. ETH dropped more than 50% in the first quarter of 2025; after hitting $1,400 on Black Monday, it managed a slight rebound, but daily volume plunged by nearly. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/ethereum-whale-holds-12-3m-in-unrealized-gains-despite-2025-downtrend/

data.title: Bitcoin rebounds as traders spot China ‘weaker yuan’ chart, but US trade war caps $80K BTC rally
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) danced around $80,000 at the April 8 Wall Street open as US stock markets staged a fresh recovery, but unresolved tensions between China and the US continue to put a damper on BTC’s upside. BTC/USD 1-hour chart. 3% in the first few hours of trading
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-rebounds-as-traders-spot-china-weaker-yuan-chart-but-us-trade-war-caps-80-k-btc-rally?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs Experience Significant Outflows
data.description: According to Odaily, recent data from Lookonchain reveals that ten U.S. Bitcoin ETFs have experienced a net outflow of 567 BTC. Among these, Grayscale's GBTC saw an outflow of 324 BTC, leaving it with a total holding of 192,233 BTC, valued at $15.06 billion. Additionally, nine Ethereum ETFs reported a net outflow of 397 ETH, with Grayscale's ETHE accounting for 247 ETH of this outflow. Grayscale ETHE currently holds 1,200,009 ETH, valued at $1.84 billion.

data.title: Coinshares Head of Asset Management Frank Spiteri Departs: Sources
data.description:
Frank Spiteri, Head of Asset Management at CoinShares, has departed the company, according to sources familiar with the matter.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/coinshares-head-of-asset-management-frank-spiteri-departs-sources/

data.title: Why Is XRP Up Today? Teucrium's 2x ETF And Rebound In Risk Appetite Spark Rally
data.description:
XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) surged more than 11% Tuesday to trade at $1. 95, clawing back losses from Monday's tariff-driven sell-off as optimism over potential U. S. trade negotiations lifted sentiment across risk assets.  
source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/04/44695353/why-is-xrp-up-today-teucriums-2x-etf-and-rebound-in-risk-appetite-spark-rally?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Ripple CTO: Ripple's acquisition of Hidden Road is a defining moment for XRPL
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Ripple CTO David Schwartz said that Ripple's $1.25 billion acquisition of major broker Hidden Road is a "decisive moment" for the blockchain payment company, which may open up more use cases for the use of XRPL in institutions, such as the use of collateral and real-world asset tokenization on XRPL in the future. (Cointelegraph)
